# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

Resources:
  BackupBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: user-uploads-and-app-backups
      AccessControl: Private
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
  ApplicationAccessRolePolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: ApplicationAccessPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt BackupBucket.Arn
              - !Join [ '', [ !GetAtt BackupBucket.Arn, '/*' ] ]
  ApplicationAccessRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: ApplicationAccessRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
  ApplicationAccessRolePolicyAttachment:
    Type: AWS::IAM::PolicyAttachment
    Properties:
      PolicyArn: !GetAtt ApplicationAccessRolePolicy.Arn
      Roles:
        - !Ref ApplicationAccessRole
